checks.name: Docker Image Exists
checks.evidence: Image exists in the mock registry data set.
checks.recommendation: Pin production deployments to immutable tags or image digests.

checks.name: Container Port Exposed
checks.recommendation: Add EXPOSE 8080 or document the container port in the ECS task definition.

checks.name: Health Check Works
checks.evidence: Health check /health returned HTTP 200 in mock validation.
checks.recommendation: Use the same path in the ALB target group.

checks.name: Required Env Vars Present
checks.evidence: Present variables: REDIS_URL, APP_ENV. Missing variables: DATABASE_URL. Values are not reported.
checks.recommendation: Add DATABASE_URL through ECS task configuration or Secrets Manager.

checks.name: Dependencies Documented
checks.evidence: Redis and Postgres dependencies are documented.
checks.recommendation: Confirm VPC routing and credentials before deployment.

checks.name: Task CPU/Memory Valid
checks.evidence: 512 CPU and 1024 MB memory is valid for Fargate.
checks.recommendation: Validate sizing with load test data.

checks.name: Secrets Not Hardcoded
checks.evidence: No hardcoded secret patterns were found.
checks.recommendation: Continue using secret references rather than plaintext values.

checks.name: CloudWatch Log Group Configured
checks.evidence: Log group /ecs/sample-app follows the expected convention.
checks.recommendation: Ensure the task definition uses awslogs with this log group.

checks.name: IAM Task Execution Role Valid
checks.evidence: Task execution role name is missing.
checks.recommendation: Provide ecsTaskExecutionRole or an equivalent least-privilege execution role.

checks.name: ALB Health Check Path Valid
checks.recommendation: Keep target group and application health paths aligned.

ai_summary: Overall deployment readiness: NOT_READY with a score of 71.88%. Top risks are the missing DATABASE_URL and missing task execution role. Fix the high-severity findings before creating an ECS service.
